title: Consultas de cohortes y retencion
description: Patrones SQL para analisis de cohortes, curvas de retencion, supervivencia y comportamiento de compra recurrente.
content:
Patrones SQL para analisis de cohortes:

**Retencion basica:**
```sql
WITH primera_compra AS (
  SELECT customer_id, MIN(FORMAT(fecha, 'yyyy-MM')) as cohorte
  FROM Sales GROUP BY customer_id
),
actividad AS (
  SELECT s.customer_id, pc.cohorte,
    DATEDIFF(month, CAST(pc.cohorte + '-01' as DATE), s.fecha) as periodo
  FROM Sales s
  JOIN primera_compra pc ON s.customer_id = pc.customer_id
)
SELECT cohorte, periodo,
  COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) as clientes_activos
FROM actividad
GROUP BY cohorte, periodo
ORDER BY cohorte, periodo
```

**Tasa de retencion porcentual:**
```sql
WITH cohortes AS (
  -- ... (como arriba)
),
tamaño_cohorte AS (
  SELECT cohorte, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) as tamaño
  FROM cohortes WHERE periodo = 0 GROUP BY cohorte
)
SELECT c.cohorte, c.periodo,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.customer_id) as activos,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT c.customer_id) / t.tamaño, 2) as pct_retencion
FROM cohortes c
JOIN tamaño_cohorte t ON c.cohorte = t.cohorte
GROUP BY c.cohorte, c.periodo, t.tamaño
```

**Churn (abandono):**
```sql
SELECT customer_id, MAX(fecha) as ultima_compra,
  DATEDIFF(day, MAX(fecha), GETDATE()) as dias_sin_compra,
  CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(day, MAX(fecha), GETDATE()) > 90 THEN 'churned'
       WHEN DATEDIFF(day, MAX(fecha), GETDATE()) > 30 THEN 'at_risk'
       ELSE 'active' END as estado
FROM Sales GROUP BY customer_id
```
